title: Metals rebound as focus returns to tight supplies and stimulus measures
section_path: Metals rebound as focus returns to tight supplies and stimulus measures
section_path_text: Metals rebound as focus returns to tight supplies and stimulus measures
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Commodities gained as investors shrugged off concerns of weaker economic growth to focus on the broad tightness across most markets amid supply side issues. A weaker USD also helped support investor appetite. Image reference: 1652997118070.png | assets/2022-05-20_metals-rebound-as-focus-returns-to-tight-supplies-and-stimulus-measures_img_1652997118070_a26dd7f779fe.png
Crude oil prices were under pressure early in the session as concerns of weaker economic growth amid tighter monetary policies by central banks remained the focus.
